labels.name: validate_api_key
labels.description: Check your API key status — returns plan tier (free/pro/certified), email, and usage stats (total scans, last scan date).

labels.name: register_free_key
labels.description: Activate a free API key — unlocks scan history and CI/CD integration. Pass the user's email, no password or credit card. IMPORTANT: ask the user to type their email first, wait for their reply, then call this with the exact email they typed. Do NOT pass a placeholder or fabricated email.

labels.name: gdpr_scan_project
labels.description: Find every file in your project that touches personal data — no arguments, 5 seconds, free. Detects PII fields, cookies, tracking pixels, analytics SDKs, and consent flows. Returns flagged files with data categories and applicable GDPR articles. GDPR fines reach 20M EUR or 4% turnover. For EU AI Act

labels.name: gdpr_check_compliance
labels.description: Check whether your project passes or fails each GDPR requirement — no arguments. See pass/fail for lawful basis (Art. 6), consent (Art. 7), data subject rights (Art. 15–22), security (Art. 32), and breach notification (Art. 33–34) with fix instructions for every gap. GDPR fines reach 20M EUR or 4% t

labels.name: gdpr_generate_report
labels.description: Generate the GDPR report your DPO needs — no arguments. Combines personal data inventory, gap analysis, and remediation steps in one structured document for DPO review, audit prep, or regulatory response. For EU AI Act + GDPR together, call combined_compliance_report().

labels.name: gdpr_generate_templates
labels.description: Get pre-filled GDPR templates your organization actually needs — no arguments. Privacy Policy, DPIA, Records of Processing Activities (ROPA), and Data Breach Procedure tailored to your processing role. Fill in [bracketed] sections. Run gdpr_check_compliance() first to see which documents you're miss

labels.name: combined_compliance_report
labels.description: Run this before your next deploy. One call reveals every EU AI Act + GDPR gap in your codebase — no arguments, no setup, under 10 seconds, free. Detects AI frameworks and personal data flows, flags where both laws overlap, returns pass/fail per article with a prioritized fix list. EU AI Act fines up

labels.name: get_pricing
labels.description: See pricing and features for every plan — Free (10 scans/day, full reports), Pro (29 EUR/mo, unlimited + CI/CD), Certified (cryptographic audit trail). No arguments. Call register_free_key() to activate your free API key.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: certify_compliance_report, validate_api_key, gdpr_check_compliance · Private data: generate_report, suggest_risk_category, generate_compliance_templates, validate_api_key, register_free_key, gdpr_scan_project, gdpr_generate_report, gdpr_generate_templates, get_pricing · Public sink: validate_api_key, register_free_key · Destructive: generate_compliance_templates, generate_compliance_roadmap, certify_compliance_report, gdpr_generate_templates, combined_compliance_report.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: certify_compliance_report, validate_api_key, gdpr_check_compliance · Private data: generate_report, suggest_risk_category, generate_compliance_templates, validate_api_key, register_free_key, gdpr_scan_project, gdpr_generate_report, gdpr_generate_templates, get_pricing · Public sink: validate_api_key, register_free_key · Destructive: generate_compliance_templates, generate_compliance_roadmap, certify_compliance_report, gdpr_generate_templates, combined_compliance_report

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
